content_body: Cabin Rentals of Georgia was great to work with and we absolutely loved our stay at Aska Escape Lodge! The cabin and finishings are beautiful, and the layout was perfect for three couples. The weather was not great so it was nice to stay in at the cabin and enjoy a fire on the covered porch. The generator was also a wonderful surprise as we did lose power with the storms, but it didn’t impact our stay at all. We will definitely be back!
title: Couples Getaway Trip in Blue Ridge, GA
